content.approval_basis: The repository owner selected the SNI question in the Codex task on 2026-07-21; only the raw question is approved at this stage.
content.question: More children are being identified as having special educational needs — what should Hungary do?
content.submission_context: Owner-selected policy question from GitHub issue #14. The apparent increase, its causes, the appropriate scope, and possible responses must not be assumed before the problem brief is reviewed.
